ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is in stock */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the inventory */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "waist_size" INTEGER /* Waist size of the clothing item */,
  "numerical_size" INTEGER /* Numerical size of the clothing item */,
  "alpha_size" TEXT /* Alpha size of the clothing item (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement of the clothing item */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the clothing item */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement of the clothing item */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement of the clothing item */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement of the clothing item */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Overall length of the clothing item */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement of the clothing item (for tops and dresses) */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement of the clothing item (for bottoms) */,
  "outseam" INTEGER /* Outseam measurement of the clothing item (for bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size association */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available in that size */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the size was added to the item */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., regular, VIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "date_shipped" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "date_delivered" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
